roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/X:PAROLE CASEMANAGER CHARLES BROWN IS PRESENT,/3000ADM/X: ADMITS VIOLATION #3, ACCESSTO A FIREARM,/3000REIN/PAJ: 180 DAYS/X: WITH TIME LOST/X: PAROLEE SHALLRECEIVE CREDIT FOR 56 DAYS,/4019HALF/SA1:DIANA WELCH/SA2:SF BOAT WORKS, 835 TERRY FRANCOIS BLVD, SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/X:THIS SENTENCE IS TO RUN CONCURRENT WITH SENTENCE  IN CASE NO, 21009020,/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS AREDISMISSED/X:PARTIES STIPULATE THAT THIS ADMISSION IS NOT TO BE USED IN ANYOTHER PROSECUTION/ /X:COURT RENEWS ORDER THAT MR, WINTERS REMAINED HOUSEDAT COJ2,/ /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
